title: taraxacum oxylobium
intro: Taraxacum oxylobium, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum oxylobium include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve digestion. Taraxacum oxylobium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
